data.title: Bitcoin Diverges From U.S. Stock Market for the First Time in a Decade, Bloomberg Reports
data.description:

source: https://btcusa.com/bitcoin-diverges-from-u-s-stock-market-for-the-first-time-in-a-decade-bloomberg-reports/

data.title: Why This Santa Claus Rally Setup Leaves Bitcoin One Shock Away From Support Retest
data.description:
Bitcoin is now trading near $89,000 after slipping under $90,000 again, and most large-cap tokens are lower on the day, which keeps the Crypto Fear & Greed Index around 25 and indicates that anxiety has eased only slightly from last week while conviction remains thin and easily shaken by routine headlines. The seasonal “Santa Claus rally” […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/santa-claus-rally-talk-meets-a-fragile-crypto-tape/

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer from Fireblocks Custody to Anonymous Address

data.title: Gala quietly changes bridge keys after users flag ‘unauthorized’ withdrawals

data.title: The $13.5 Billion Liquidity Injection That Could Send Bitcoin And Crypto Prices Flying
data.description:
Bitcoin has been struggling to build momentum in recent weeks, and the return of cash into the system is raising questions about whether this could be the moment that changes the tone of the crypto market. That growing sense of anticipation has already started to show up in prices, with the total crypto market cap climbing more than $250 billion from its $3. 016 trillion low on December 2. What Happened: The Liquidity Injection And Why It Matters After officially bringing its multi-year quantitative tightening (QT) program to an end, the central bank followed up with a $13
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-and-crypto-prices-flying/

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,000 USDT with a 4.73% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 05, 2025, 19:00 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,000 USDT and is now trading at 2,992.5 USDT, with a narrowed 4.73% decrease in 24 hours.
